title: lithocardium macranthum
intro: Lithocardium macranthum, also known as Digitalis purpurea, is a flowering plant in the foxglove family, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and diuretic effects, making it useful for treating heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of lithocardium macranthum include improved cardiac function, reduced blood pressure, and increased urine production, which can help alleviate symptoms of edema and other cardiovascular conditions. Lithocardium macranthum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, and it is often used in herbal supplements and medications to support heart health.
